trivia: The 328JET is exactly what it sounds like: the Dornier 328 turboprop re-engined with turbofans. Same fuselage, same wing, jet speed, and a niche all its own among 30-seat aircraft.
The US Air Force flies 328JETs as the C-146A Wolfhound for special operations transport, so the J328 your antenna caught might be military in plain clothes.
funFacts: USAF C-146A Wolfhound is a converted 328JET.
About 110 were built before production ended.
